text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Look at me! I made it through the NHKMile Cup! My all-or-nothing efforttook me to the tear-jerking light onthe other side. Yes, it was thatsublime...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
When I come to, I see both Opera O<n>and Doto! You
mean they actually<n>came to check on me?!
Apparently,<n>they're both planning to run in the
Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's gonna be the event of a lifetime!<n>But Opera
O's invitation also comes<n>with a request—she
wants to see how<n>I perform on dirt. Looks like I'll
have<n>to put on a good show!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Will the radiance I saw on the turf<n>today be the
same on dirt? I'll find<n>out in my next race—the
Japan Dirt<n>Derby!
